# Petals & Polish - Modern Next.js Website

## Project Overview
A modern, mobile-first Next.js website with smooth scrolling animations and fully responsive design.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 15+ with App Router
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom animations
- **Linting**: ESLint
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Key Features
✓ Mobile-first responsive design  
✓ Smooth scroll animations (native CSS)  
✓ Modern UI with Tailwind CSS  
✓ Type-safe TypeScript implementation  
✓ Optimized performance with Next.js  
✓ Accessible components  
✓ SEO optimized with metadata  

## Development
```bash
npm run dev
```
Visit http://localhost:3000

## Production Build
```bash
npm run build
npm start
```

## Project Structure
- `/src/app` - Next.js App Router pages
- `/src/components` - Reusable React components
- `/public` - Static assets

## Custom Features Implemented
1. **Smooth Scrolling**: CSS scroll-behavior set to smooth for all pages
2. **Mobile Optimization**: Responsive breakpoints and touch-friendly UI
3. **Hero Section**: Eye-catching landing section with CTA
4. **Feature Cards**: Responsive grid layout that adapts to screen size
5. **Navigation**: Mobile-friendly header with responsive design
6. **Animations**: Smooth transitions and hover effects
